titleStmt.title: SII 26.160: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 160. (A.R. No. 152 of 1909.) SAṄGRĀMANALLŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places. It records a gift made by the king of the village of Umāparamēśvarinallūr in Kāvāḍikkā-nāḍu as dēvadāna, together with its existing tenants, to the goddess in the temple of Virachōḻayīśvaramuḍaiyār. It is stipulated that the various taxes, paid in the form of kaḻañjus (gold coins) by the tenants of the gift village, should be paid as the villagers of the dēvadāṉa Dēvanpāḍi did. It is further stated that the taxes should be received and remitted to the temple treasury by the temple tānattārs (trustees) and not by the members of the temple executive council.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koṉerimelkoṇṭāṉ kāvāṭikkā nāṭṭu Umāparameśvarinallūr Ūrāṟku nam Olai kuṭutta paricāvatu Uṭaiyār viraco
ḻiyiśvaramuṭaiyār koyil periyanācciyāṟkuk kuṭiniṅkāt tevatāṉamāvutākavum patiṉ Āṟāvatu mutal kuṭuttapaṭikku Ivvūrkku Ellaiyāva
tu kiḻpāṟkellai coḻaṉūrkku Umā parameśvarinallūṟkum Ottakkuti Ellaiyāvutākavum teṉpāṟkellai civattevaṉ pāṭikkum Umā
parameśvarinallūṟkum Ottakkuti Ellaiyāvatākavum melpāṟkellai melait tevaṉ pāṭikkum Ivvūṟkum Ottakkuti Ellaiyāvutākavu
m vaṭapāṟkellai Eṟṟaṭi m Ottakkuti Ellaiyāvutākavum Iṉ nāṉkellai Uḷḷūppuṟaṇi ppiracetu Uṇpārkaḷākavum Ivvūṟkkuṭimai
Iṟukkumiṭattu Oṭa ka rumakamapama ruceka Āka Ā kaḻañ l
kkaṟukkakkaṭavārkaḷākavum Elavai vukavai maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭiṉavum tevatāṉam tevaṉpāṭi Iṟuttapaṭi Iṟu
ppārkaḷākavum Iv ṟu ṇa viracoḻa Īcuramuṭaiyār koyiltāṉattāre Ārāyntu cipaṇṭāra
ttukku Oṭukkuvārkaḷākavum Atikārikaḷ Oṭukkakaṭavarallātārākavum Iv vūreṟiṉa maṉṟāṭikaḷukku vilai Oṟṟi tanmatā
naṅkaḷukkum ciriti ṅkaḷukku Urittāvutākavum patiṉāṟāvatu mutal tiruviḷak keṇṇaikku kuṭuttanantamāraṉār pāṟ
paṭuttukkuṭukka virarācentirapiramappallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu panmāheśvara rakṣai .§
Digital edition of SII 26.160 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
